Raisin Kidd — the look is locked, pick his pose

The Leaping Trickster with the cane swapped for glowing gumdrop hands. Both are the same approved character — just pick which pose becomes the base for his boss sheet (the other read can still show up as an attack frame).

The Leap

High mid-air leaping strike, one glowing gumdrop palm thrust forward — keeps the acrobatic trickster energy you picked. Great for the warp-in / Grapes-of-Wrath flurry.

The Master's Guard

Grounded wushu power-stance, both glowing palms raised in an open-hand guard — reads strongest as the deflecting, untouchable defender.
